meaning: n.厄瓜多尔(南美洲西北海岸的国家)
examples: Ecuador provides a perfect introduction to South America; it's a continent in miniature.
The greenback provided financial stability and made Ecuador attractive to foreign players and coaches.
The aircraft belonged to Ecuador Airline, but it had been chartered by Air France for the route from Bogota to the Ecuadorian capital Quito.
Studies have shown that chronic lateness has cost countries such as Ecuador billions per year.
Five detectives were sent to Ecuador to learn more about the victim and his family.
